examples.title: Algorithm: String Length
examples.description: Calculates the length of a given string
examples.code:
ALGORITHM StringLength
INPUT: string
OUTPUT: length

BEGIN
 length = 0
 FOR EACH character IN string
 length = length + 1
 END FOR
 RETURN length
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates how to calculate the length of a string by iterating over each character and incrementing a counter.
